creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
On Sat, 14 Sep 2013, edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [patch] emulators/wine : update to latest stable version

Thanks for the patch.  I do have code for the update myself, but
want to wait for version .1 before making that change since it's
quite a major update and settling a bit may be a good idea.

As for the proposed patch, it differs from what I have in some
regards:  1. PORTEPOCH can never be removed.  
2. Why did you remove PORTSCOUT?
3. Some whitespace changes.

Gerald
